title: ctp-core: Open, reproducible CT Perfusion analysis core (IORN-001)
description: ctp-core is the open, reproducible scientific core of a CT Perfusion (CTP) analysis pipeline. It provides gamma-variate fitting, baseline correction, peak detection, derived perfusion parameters, a reproducible synthetic data generator, ASIST-Japan standard a-LUT visualization, validation scripts and tests. It contains no GUI, no DICOM I/O, and no confidential, client, or patient data. This is the reproducible core referenced by Institute of One Research Note IORN-001.
